description: CompositionWhite and blue checked shorts, made of 100% cotton, with zipper fly and button closure at the waist, pockets on the sides with two buttoned pockets on the hipsFitRegularWash careWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron motif/print/trims/logoRelax and chill out in these shorts from probase. These cotton shorts stretch and move with your body offering a comfortable feel. The deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a t-shirt from and flip flops for a chilled out look.Model statisticsThe product is size 32, length of 41" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
